prompt: A stylized ANIMATED-FILM skyline of London — NOT photorealistic. Painterly semi-3D animation look like a high-end animated movie matte painting / Pixar-Disney background art: soft volumetric light, hand-painted brush texture, clean shapes, smooth gradients, rich atmospheric depth. ELEVATED WIDE SKYLINE PANORAMA seen from a high distant vantage point across the city — NOT street level, NOTHING close to the camera, no foreground objects. Scene: the London skyline along the River Thames at twilight — Big Ben and the Houses of Parliament, the London Eye, Tower Bridge, The Shard and St Paul's dome spread across the horizon, soft city lights glowing. Color palette: deep berry purple and raspberry magenta sky lit by a vivid papaya-orange sunset glow with warm amber reflections on the Thames. NO cars, NO vehicles, NO people, NO products — pure city scenery only. Wide cinematic 16:9 composition. Absolutely NO text, NO words, NO logos, NO badges, NO frames or borders.
